title: Vanillite
body:
I am very happy to publish my first and hopefully not the last minecraft project. Meet Vanillite!
Vanillite is a mod created with the support of MCreator. This mod focuses on small game changes starting with decorative blocks ending with food.
                     Descri[tion
 The first chips will be fully ported copper and tuff blocks from version 1.21. All of them were ported with great detail, but some crafts were changed for the sake of logic and balance.
                                                      ! WARNING !
In fashion, tuff doors and sometimes hatch, when updating ticks and becoming a more oxidized version, are destroyed, so far I do not know how to fix it, but wax options work properly.
             New Blocks
 The second innovation will be polished netherracks, this set of blocks is created for a variety of buildings and adding more functionality to a regular netherrack.

 The third innovation was hollow shroomfruit. It can be found in natural generation in the same place as the usual shroomfruit and used to create new food in hell.

 The fourth innovation is Boomstone! This block can be found in natural generation in hell like quartz. It is impossible to get it and when you try to destroy it, it explodes by breaking blocks. Although this block cannot be obtained, it still activates the explosion of neighbors when it explodes, but at the same time they drop out as an object. Thus, having found Boomstone deposits, you can extract them and easily find ancient fragments.

 The following blocks, I am sure, will be needed by everyone in their survival. I am glad to present compressed versions of the blocks:
 Thread, ender pearl, ender's eye, rotten flesh, blaze powder, dyes, ink, horus fruit, amethyst shards, phantom membrane, flint, spider eyes and books.
 All these blocks are designed to organize your chests and help you develop your construction.

 The next block added by the mod are Wooden pillars and their hewn versions. They have incredibly convenient crafting and will perfectly fit into your buildings!

 In addition to the above things, there are many other things in fashion, starting with SAMSA and ending with combat picks!

 I hope you liked my mod and you will be happy to download it!
